scripts.build: pnpm --filter @jue/compiler run build && node -e "require('fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true});require('fs').rmSync('../../node_modules/.cache/jue/skyline',{recursive:true,force:true})" && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --format=cjs --platform=node --target=esnext --outfile=dist/index.cjs --sourcemap && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist
